candidate_A.profile: Candidate A is a woman in her early thirties who currently lives in a mid-sized city in the state of Illinois, in the United States. She recently traveled internationally, with her itinerary involving a connection through Beijing. She has an evident interest in photography and consumer electronics — her recent purchases include camera accessories, leather goods, and imported specialty food items. A routine internal imaging examination was conducted and returned entirely normal results. Her income places her in a moderate professional bracket, and she receives a year-end bonus. She tends to be photographed in the company of close friends.
